text: Standing outside the glass-walled room, peering in at a gathering, I am struck by a sense of separation and curiosity. I watch the group interact, feeling like both an observer and a participant, poised on the threshold of inclusion. Entering the R+D-themed exhibition in the next moment, I am enveloped by a vibrant, stimulating environment dedicated to innovation and reflection. The words on the wall echo my own internal monologue, enhancing my feeling of being both present and slightly detached, as though this space is a liminal zone between understanding and exploration. I'm thoughtful, stimulated by the environment, both curious and uncertain where it will lead.
